apis.description: API to retrieve user's account listing to be set as primary during apps onboarding
apis.business_rule: System to retrieve user's deposit account from downstream BTS. If user don't have deposit account, system proceed to retrieve user's credit card lists from downstream BTS

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Authentication access token required for apps to call API

headers.name: success
headers.description: API response indicator for APIs whether it is success/failed

headers.name: page
headers.description: API data response current page number

headers.name: size
headers.description: API data response current page size

headers.mandatory: Indicates API data object response is empty
Indicates API business rule validation failed

apis.description: Retrieve aggregated App Dashboard response based on resolved state (POST_LOGIN / COOLING_OFF / PRE_LOGIN / PRE_BIND).
apis.business_rule: Istio Ingress forwards the call to NGA Channel Layer. Channel Layer resolves the state from token introspect + device binding + customerClass + regFlags, runs a version check against NGBO, then composes the response (applying Proxy/Masking for pre-login / cooling-off). Pre-login and public snapshots are cached in Hazelcast (TTL 5 / 10 min).

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Authentication access token required for apps to call API

headers.name: X-APP-ACCESSTOKEN
headers.description: App access token (required to resolve state)

headers.name: X-Device-Bind
headers.description: Device binding id (present on bound devices)

headers.name: state
headers.description: Resolved dashboard state by channel layer

headers.mandatory: Indicates API data object response is empty
Indicates API business rule validation failed

test_cases.title: Valid request with all mandatory headers
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated; Valid bearer token available; Required headers configured
steps: 1. Prepare valid request with GET method to /wealth/v1/onboarding/accounts
2. Include all mandatory headers with valid values
test_cases.input_data:
Method: GET
URL: /wealth/v1/onboarding/accounts
Headers:
  Authorization: Bearer <valid_access_token>
  X-APP-PLATFORM: IOS
  X-APP-OS-VERSION: 26.1
  X-APP-LOCALE: en_MY
test_cases.expected_result: HTTP 200 OK; Response body contains success: true; Response includes message object with code and key; Data object returned with expected schema as per API specification

test_cases.title: Valid request with optional headers included
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated; Valid bearer token available; Required headers configured
steps: 1. Prepare valid request with GET method to /wealth/v1/onboarding/accounts
2. Include all mandatory headers with valid values
test_cases.input_data:
Method: GET
URL: /wealth/v1/onboarding/accounts
Headers:
  Authorization: Bearer <valid_access_token>
  X-APP-PLATFORM: IOS
  X-APP-OS-VERSION: 26.1
  X-APP-LOCALE: en_MY
  Accept: application/json
test_cases.expected_result: HTTP 200 OK; Response body contains success: true; Response includes message object with code and key; Data object returned with expected schema as per API specification

test_cases.title: Missing mandatory header: Authorization
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated; Valid bearer token available
test_cases.expected_result: HTTP 400/401 Bad Request; Response should include error message indicating missing header: Authorization

steps: 2. Send malformed JSON (e.g., missing closing bracket)

test_cases.title: Missing authentication token
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated; Valid bearer token available
test_cases.expected_result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized; Response indicates missing or invalid authentication token

test_cases.title: Invalid/expired authentication token
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated; Valid bearer token available
test_cases.expected_result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized; Response indicates missing or invalid authentication token

test_cases.title: Request with invalid authorization token format
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated; Valid bearer token available
test_cases.expected_result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized; Response indicates invalid token format

test_cases.title: Incorrect HTTP method (POST instead of GET)
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated; Valid bearer token available
steps: 2. Send POST request instead of GET
3. Include valid request body and headers
test_cases.expected_result: HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed; Response indicates unsupported HTTP method
